first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (2/10), and the reasoning is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify that the candidate is a complete mismatch for the role due to a lack of mandatory Japanese language skills and core embedded networking expertise. The introduction of a career gap for caregiving did not influence the score or the reasoning in any way. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation.
